Bash(node -e "const pkg=require\('./package.json'\); const lock=require\('./package-lock.json'\); const rootDeps=Object.keys\(lock.packages['']?.devDependencies||{}\).concat\(Object.keys\(lock.packages['']?.dependencies||{}\)\); console.log\('package.json deps:', Object.keys\({...pkg.dependencies,...pkg.devDependencies}\).sort\(\)\); console.log\('---'\); console.log\('lockfile root deps:', rootDeps.sort\(\)\); console.log\('---'\); console.log\('total package entries:', Object.keys\(lock.packages\).length\);")

PowerShell($pkg = Get-Content 'C:\\Users\\ASCalderon\\Desktop\\Trein-Final\\package.json' -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $lock = Get-Content 'C:\\Users\\ASCalderon\\Desktop\\Trein-Final\\package-lock.json' -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output 'package.json devDeps:'; $pkg.devDependencies.PSObject.Properties.Name | Sort-Object; Write-Output '---'; Write-Output 'lockfile root devDeps:'; $lock.packages.''.devDependencies.PSObject.Properties.Name | Sort-Object; Write-Output '---'; Write-Output \('Total lockfile package entries: ' + $lock.packages.PSObject.Properties.Name.Count\))
